testcase.name: test_usb_driver_bridges_capability_backend

failure.message: AssertionError: expected at least the simulated backend devices assert []

testcase.failure:
def test_usb_driver_bridges_capability_backend(): """The USB driver must reflect real enumerated devices, not hardcoded mocks.""" manager = get_usb_manager() devices = manager.enumerate() > assert devices, "expected at least the simulated backend devices" E AssertionError: expected at least the simulated backend devices E assert []
tests\test_hardware_drivers.py:71: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_usb_driver_respects_permission_policy

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure:
def test_usb_driver_respects_permission_policy(): """Connecting a device not allowed by policy must be denied, not faked.""" manager = get_usb_manager() devices = manager.enumerate() > device = devices[0] ^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range
tests\test_hardware_drivers.py:95: IndexError
